languages.original_text: "Use of your characteristic primitive heuristics is absent. I am surprised. The potential danger level of the phenomenon has been revised upward."

languages.text: "Удивлен отсутствию использования присущих тебе примитивных эвристических методов. Уровень потенциальной опасности феномена пересмотрен в сторону повышения".
"Use of your characteristic primitive heuristics is absent. I am surprised. The potential danger level of the phenomenon has been revised upward."
languages.original_text: "Удивлен отсутствию использования присущих тебе примитивных эвристических методов. Уровень потенциальной опасности феномена пересмотрен в сторону повышения".

traits.locale_text: "Use of your characteristic primitive heuristics is absent. I am surprised. The potential danger level of the phenomenon has been revised upward."
"Use of your characteristic primitive heuristics is absent. I am surprised. The potential danger level of the phenomenon has been revised upward."
"Use of your characteristic primitive heuristics is absent. I am surprised. The potential danger level of the phenomenon has been revised upward."

languages.text: «Su heurística característica brilla por su ausencia. Eso me sorprende. El nivel de peligro potencial del fenómeno se ha elevado».
languages.original_text: "Use of your characteristic primitive heuristics is absent. I am surprised. The potential danger level of the phenomenon has been revised upward."

traits.locale_text: «Su heurística característica brilla por su ausencia. Eso me sorprende. El nivel de peligro potencial del fenómeno se ha elevado».

languages.text: 「あなたに特有の原始的なヒューリスティックの使用が見られません。自分は驚いています。この現象の潜在的危険度を上方修正しました」
languages.original_text: "Use of your characteristic primitive heuristics is absent. I am surprised. The potential danger level of the phenomenon has been revised upward."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたに特有の原始的なヒューリスティックの使用が見られません。自分は驚いています。この現象の潜在的危険度を上方修正しました」

languages.text: “你那标志性的原始直觉逻辑并未出现。这令我深感意外。该现象的潜在危险等级现已向上修正。”
languages.original_text: "Use of your characteristic primitive heuristics is absent. I am surprised. The potential danger level of the phenomenon has been revised upward."

traits.locale_text: “你那标志性的原始直觉逻辑并未出现。这令我深感意外。该现象的潜在危险等级现已向上修正。”

languages.text: "Wo bleibt Eure typische primitive Heuristik? Ich bin überrascht. Die potenzielle Bedrohung durch das Phänomen wurde hochgestuft."
languages.original_text: "Use of your characteristic primitive heuristics is absent. I am surprised. The potential danger level of the phenomenon has been revised upward."

traits.locale_text: "Wo bleibt Eure typische primitive Heuristik? Ich bin überrascht. Die potenzielle Bedrohung durch das Phänomen wurde hochgestuft."

languages.text: « Absence d'utilisation de logique, même primitive. C'est surprenant. Le niveau de danger du phénomène a été revu à la hausse. »
languages.original_text: "Use of your characteristic primitive heuristics is absent. I am surprised. The potential danger level of the phenomenon has been revised upward."

traits.locale_text: « Absence d'utilisation de logique, même primitive. C'est surprenant. Le niveau de danger du phénomène a été revu à la hausse. »

languages.text: "Sizin karakteristik ilkel sezgiselliğinizin kullanımı mevcut değil. Şaşırdım. Bu olgunun potansiyel tehlike seviyesi yukarı doğru revize edildi."
languages.original_text: "Use of your characteristic primitive heuristics is absent. I am surprised. The potential danger level of the phenomenon has been revised upward."

traits.locale_text: "Sizin karakteristik ilkel sezgiselliğinizin kullanımı mevcut değil. Şaşırdım. Bu olgunun potansiyel tehlike seviyesi yukarı doğru revize edildi."
